_description: Gold set for Retrieval Team nodes ablation study. Each subclaim is annotated with the expected source, 1 expected search query (because dynamic_coins is 1), and the expected retrieval strategy.

gold_subclaims.subclaim: Glycyl-tRNA synthetase gene involved in development of Charcot-Marie-Tooth disease.
Varenicline monotherapy after 12 weeks more effective than combination nicotine replacement therapies with bupropion.
32% of liver transplantation programs required patients to discontinue methadone treatment in 2001.
A high microerythrocyte count raises vulnerability to severe anemia in homozygous alpha (+)- thalassemia trait subjects.
Trastuzumab (Herceptin) potential use in treatment of prostate cancer.
Amiodarone belongs to class I anti-arrhythmic drugs.
Transplanted human glial progenitor cells incapable of forming a neural network with host animals' neurons.
expected_queries: glial progenitor cells neural network formation

gold_subclaims.subclaim: Transcranial pulse stimulation (TPS) improves mental performance in people with Alzheimer's dementia.
expected_queries: Transcranial pulse stimulation Alzheimer's dementia trials

gold_subclaims.subclaim: Complete genome of bacteria of the genus Arthrobacter is available.
